title: SMPinOne
description: All-in-one SMP Paper plugin with custom recipes, anti-xray ore masking, villager capture, mace controls, and enchant limits.
body:
*JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER*

# SMPinOne

**A lightweight all-in-one Paper plugin designed for SMP servers.**

SMPinOne combines **gameplay tweaks, villager utilities, anti-xray protection, enchant limits, and admin tools** into a single modular plugin. Instead of installing multiple plugins, run **one optimized system** that keeps your server balanced and easier to manage.

Built for **Paper servers** and designed to stay **simple, performant, and configurable**.

---

## Features

## Gameplay Tweaks

### EzWebs

Craft cobwebs easily for traps and builds.

* **5 string (corners + center) → 1 cobweb**
* Great for traps, PvP setups, and builds

### EzGaps

Balanced golden apple crafting for SMP gameplay.

* **1 apple + 4 gold ingots (cross pattern) → 2 golden apples**
* The vanilla **8 gold ingot recipe is disabled**

---

## Combat & Item Controls

### MaceFreedom

Full control over mace usage on your server.

* Toggle **mace crafting** on or off
* Optional **mace hit cooldown**
* Configurable **global mace craft limit**
* Tracks total crafted maces
* Logs detected mace holders (**name + UUID**)

Managed with:
**/smpone mace ...**

---

## Villager Tools

### Villager Capture

Transport villagers easily without boats or minecarts.

* **Shift + Right Click** to capture a villager
* Captured villagers become **inventory items**
* Preserves villager data:

  * Profession
  * Level
  * Age
  * Villager type
  * Custom name
  * Trade state
* Captured villager items use **profession-based head textures**

### Infinite Villager Trades

Removes frustrating trade limits.

* Villager trades remain **effectively unlimited**
* Prevents normal **lock/restock bottlenecks**
* Ideal for **trading halls and SMP economies**

---

## Server Protection

### AntiXray (Hidden Ore Masking)

Reduces the effectiveness of xray and block-ESP cheats.

* Hidden ores appear as **normal blocks client-side**
* Only **exposed ores** are visible
* Detects suspicious **straight-to-ore mining**
* Logs activity and **notifies operators**

Managed with:
**/smpone xray on|off**

---

## Enchantment Limits

Prevent overpowered gear on your server.

* Configure **maximum levels per enchant**
* Example: **Protection capped at III**
* Automatically **downgrades illegal enchant levels**
* Enforced on:

  * Enchanting tables
  * Anvil outputs
  * Inventory scans

Players receive **private red chat messages** when enchantments are adjusted.

Managed with:
**/smpone enchantlimit ...**

---

## Admin Utilities

### Command Access Control

Hide or disable commands for non-op players.

* Prevent command abuse
* Configurable command restrictions
* Supports **live reload**

Managed with:
**/smpone commandaccess reload**

---

## Why SMPinOne?

**✔ Reduce plugin clutter**
**✔ Improve SMP gameplay balance**
**✔ Protect against xray cheats**
**✔ Manage villagers easily**
**✔ Control powerful items and enchants**

All in **one modular plugin.**

*JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER*
